'''Yang Earth Monkey''' is the 45th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 戊 Tsuchinoe (yang earth, the gaia-aligned face of autumn), and its branch is 申 Saru, the [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's earth generates the branch's metal, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Fire Goat]] (node 44) and [[Yin Earth Rooster]] (node 46).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] — yang earth
* '''Branch:''' [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] — yang metal
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' autumn

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Fire Goat]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Earth Rooster]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904781}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
